_doc: THROWAWAY ground-truth spec (Phase-4, ckpt 153 — U/D-POSE physics, per-tick BODY). Lean (6 body fields, no constants — those are in pose_consts_fields.json) so the read overhead is small and the run reaches the late freeroam pose frames. Reads Arche's per-tick body during crouch/up-pose/slide to PIN the apply states 2/5/6 brake law. Chain = leader [room_state 0x2784, leader-slot 0x200c, entity 0x9f4]; body = *(entity+0x40).

0x5b8fc0.name: arche_pose_body
0x5b8fc0._note: FUN_005b8fc0 Flip (once/frame). Per-tick body during the U/D pose.

fields.name: hvel
fields.reason: body+0x28 horizontal vel — THE pose target

fields.name: bstate
fields.reason: body+0x38 FSM main|sub<<16 (2 crouch / 5 up / 6 slide)
